views.title: CCDNS
views.subtitle: Instant DNS switching via Control Center

views.markdown:
## CCDNS

Instant DNS switching directly from Control Center.

---

### Features
- Control Center toggle
- Instant profile switching
- Lightweight & fast
- Rootless support
- iOS 16 optimized

---

### Compatibility
- iOS 16+
- Dopamine / palera1n

---

### Developer
Made by lilnynho
